creator: dan@langille.org
text:
How-To-Repeat: select SQLITE3 in make config
then make package
you will see:

[root@ngaio:~/src/bacula-server] # make package
===>  Building package for bacula-server-1.38.11_1
Creating package /usr/ports/packages/All/bacula-server-1.38.11_1.tbz
Registering depends: sqlite-3.3.7 pkg-config-0.21.
Registering conflicts: bacula-server-devel-[0-9]* bacula-client-devel-[0-9]*.
Creating bzip'd tar ball in '/usr/ports/packages/All/bacula-server-1.38.11_1.tbz'
tar: share/bacula/create_sqlite_database: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: share/bacula/drop_sqlite_database: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: share/bacula/drop_sqlite_tables: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: share/bacula/grant_sqlite_privileges: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: share/bacula/make_sqlite_tables: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: share/bacula/update_sqlite_tables: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256
*** Error code 1

Stop in /root/src/bacula-server.
[root@ngaio:~/src/bacula-server] # joe pkg-install
Processing '/usr/local/etc/joe/joerc'...Processing '/usr/local/etc/joe/ftyperc'...done
done
